overall.description: First-person exploration through an abandoned industrial complex in a desert environment, transitioning from dimly lit interior corridors and workshops to an outdoor yard at golden hour. The setting features Wraiths gang graffiti, industrial machinery, and shipping containers against red rock formations, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Badlands region.

events.description: exits small storage room into narrow industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through dimly lit storage area and adjacent corridor

entered.detail: stacks of brown cardboard boxes piled against the wall
small window with red-tinted light filtering through
orange-brown wooden dresser with multiple drawers
red wall-mounted fire extinguisher in metal case

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a cramped storage room filled with cardboard boxes and a wooden dresser, illuminated by red light from a window. The camera moves into a narrow concrete corridor where a fire extinguisher is mounted on the wall, maintaining a slow exploratory pace through the abandoned facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level industrial atrium with metal walkways

ascends metal staircase to upper walkway level

elevated metal grating walkway with yellow safety railings
large beige industrial HVAC unit on the walkway
metal staircase with yellow railings connecting walkway levels

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast industrial atrium with metal walkways and overhead skylights allowing natural light to filter through. The camera ascends stairs past a large 'WRAITHS' sign painted on a yellow container, navigating elevated platforms with industrial HVAC equipment and yellow safety railings.

events.description: enters enclosed corridor with windows revealing desert landscape outside
passes through doorway into dimmer interior section

agents.ego_description: walking through corridor while observing the desert terrain visible through side windows

blue plastic barrel near the corridor wall
heavy metal industrial door with horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: Moving through a long corridor with windows on both sides revealing the desert Badlands environment outside, the camera passes industrial doors and storage items. The lighting shifts between natural light from the windows and artificial overhead fixtures as the character progresses deeper into the facility.

events.description: enters workshop area with vending machines and workbenches
approaches open garage door with bright exterior sunlight streaming in

agents.ego_description: surveying workshop area with industrial equipment and vending machines before heading toward the exit

entered.detail: red and black 'NICOLA' vending machine with illuminated display
industrial workbench with tools and equipment
large open garage door revealing bright exterior light

segments.scene_description: The segment explores an interior workshop containing a vending machine, workbenches, and scattered equipment. The camera moves toward a large open garage door where intense golden-hour sunlight streams in, marking the transition point between the industrial interior and the exterior environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert industrial yard with shipping containers

events.description: exits building into open desert industrial yard with graffiti-covered walls
pan reveals large 'CORP-BUD' neon sign on building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through the exterior yard surveying the abandoned industrial equipment and desert landscape

entered.detail: wall covered in teal and white skull graffiti
large illuminated green neon sign reading 'CORP-BUD'
large red rock canyon walls in the background
stacked metal shipping containers in various colors
large white satellite dish mounted on a structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges into a wide-open industrial yard bathed in golden hour sunlight, revealing the exterior of the abandoned complex. The camera moves past graffiti-covered walls and shipping containers, with a prominent 'CORP-BUD' neon sign visible on the building facade and dramatic red rock formations dominating the background landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic, dimly lit depths of an abandoned facility into a vast, sun-drenched desert industrial yard. It begins in a cramped storage room bathed in red light, moving through a narrow concrete corridor before opening into a massive industrial atrium filled with metal walkways and overhead skylights. As the camera ascends past a yellow container marked with Wraiths graffiti, it traverses a long corridor where the lighting fluctuates between artificial fixtures and glimpses of the Badlands outside. The scene then shifts through a cluttered interior workshop, moving steadily toward a large open garage door where intense golden-hour sunlight begins to flood the space. Finally, the camera emerges fully into the wide-open exterior yard, passing graffiti-covered walls and a neon Corp-Bud sign against a backdrop of dramatic red rock formations.
